description_long: This lantern features a bulbous, faceted glass body in a pale blue hue, giving it a traditional yet stylized appearance. The upper section is capped with a multi-tiered, pagoda-like roof structure in a warm brown color, reminiscent of East Asian architectural motifs. Small rectangular windows encircle the upper portion, suggesting light emission from within. The topmost part is finished with a blue, diamond-shaped finial, adding a decorative touch. The glass body appears semi-opaque, likely diffusing the light softly. The overall design suggests it is intended for outdoor urban use, such as in parks or along walkways.
description: A stylized lantern with a faceted blue glass body and a brown, pagoda-style roof, featuring small windows and a decorative finial.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full faceted blue glass body and the brown, tiered roof with visible windows.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view revealing more of the lantern's left side and the geometric facets of the glass body.
description_view_2: Rear view with the same architectural roof and glass body, but less window detail visible.
description_view_3: Right-side view, mirroring view 1, with the blue glass and brown roof clearly visible.
